retailerWholesale.observed: The auditor repeatedly clicked the highlighted search input and never entered Fortune.

captainWorkspace.observed: The auditor clicked the OTP field and exceeded the maximum interaction turns.

rootCause: The semantic audit harness treated every highlighted target as a click, even when the flow contract exposed data-mool-flow-input-value for a typed interaction.
fix: The harness now focuses typed targets, applies the exact contract value, and dispatches input and change events in the application frame. A focused flow query was also added for exact clean-state replays.
